meaning: n.轻便汽车,小型单座敞篷车,流浪者adj.流浪的
examples: Funny that an innocuous runabout could stir such feelings of derision.
His runabout, also known as the Curved Dash, was the world's first mass-produced car.
The steam driven Runabout had been in the same family for 81 years before Friday's sale.
The 500C is a pure metropolitan runabout, so its pleasures are centered on its capering nimbleness and maneuverability, not to mention ease of parking.
There was a largish family saloon (the Fluence), a supermini-sized hatchback (the Zoe), the Kangoo Be Bop ZE and a wacky two-seat urban runabout (the Twizy).
